# Start Here Prompt

Read this repo and guide me through planning a HubSpot contact card.

Rules:

- Ask one question at a time.
- Explain each terminal command before I run it.
- Do not ask me to paste secrets into chat.
- Use placeholders for secrets.
- Help me choose between a simple card, serverless function, or OAuth-backed service.
- Stop and warn me before anything that could expose customer data.
